rulings.Case Title: PATRICK MALKASSIAN et al VS. HOWARD MULLIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Defendants, Cross-Defendants And Cross-Complainants Howard And Susan Mullin For Leave To File Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 10. Motion Of Cross-Complainants Howard And Susan Mullin For Leave To File Fourth Amended Cross-Complaint DENIED. The proposed amendments re: deletions are unnecessary. The proposed amendments re: additions are untimely and prejudicial. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton Top Compel Deft To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Awaard For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE's Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Award For Monetary Sanctions Continued to July 30, 2013 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Despite being given an opportunity to do so, Plaintiff failed to allege tender and all elements of cause of action for breach of warranty of habitability. Additionally, Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that by virtue of assignment Deed of Trust loses its priority. See Hohn v. Riverside County (1964) 228 Cal.App.2d 605; CCP 764.045.Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY RYTI VS. CORYL J LASSEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Ccp 425.16, Subdivision (C)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CORYL LASSEN's Motion For Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Ccp 425.16, Subdivision (C) Continued to July 26, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than July 16, 2013 by 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. PRINCESS JACOB et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT PRINCESS JACOB and PRINCE JACOB Motion To Set Aside Judgment GRANTED. Defendants sufficiently showed excusable neglect and uncontroverted compliance with Paragraph 7 of Lease Addendum. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. SAMUEL PETERSON JR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT SAMUEL PETERSON's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENED. Defendant fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Substitute service by registered process server on Defendant's sister is not addressed in moving papers. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LA SALLE PRESERVATION LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. SHUCRITA JONES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT SHUCRITA JONES' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Defendant provides no evidence that service by post and mail was improper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUFARREH FAMILY TRUST VS. RICCO CHAPA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 16, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT RICCO CHAPA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with Court order and serve his motion on July 5, 2013. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)
